name: GIGABYTE Z790 AORUS PRO X WIFI7 ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700 - 1x PCIe 5.0 x16 - 1x PCIe 4.0 x4 - 1x PCIe 3.0 x4 - Support DDR5-8266(OC) - 5x M.2 Slots - USB 3.2 Gen 2x2 Type-C - HDMI 2.1 - Realtek 5GbE LAN - Intel 802.11be Wi-Fi 7
shortName: GIGABYTE Z790 AORUS PRO X WIFI7 ATX Motherboard - Socket LGA 1700
description: ATX gaming motherboard for Intel 12th/13th gen with Z790 chipset and WiFi 7 support.

specs.pcie_slots: 1x PCIe 5.0 x16, 1x PCIe 4.0 x4, 1x PCIe 3.0 x4
